title: MemoryRecord
description: A single durable memory artifact in the governed store. Canonical records live append-only in data/memory/*.jsonl; the validator in src/governed_memory/records.py enforces this contract on write.

id.description: Stable unique identifier (UUID4). Citations reference this value.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 creation time. Determines the monthly log file.

type.description: 'source' is something ingested; 'concept' is a durable idea that cites sources.

summary.description: The load-bearing field. Indexed for summary-first navigation; must stand on its own.

body.description: Full content. NOT indexed for full-text search; opened only on demand.

sensitivity.description: 'restricted' records require an explicit acknowledgement to write.

sources.description: Ids of cited records. Must be empty for a 'source'. Every id MUST resolve to an existing record (verified).

content_sha256.description: Derived content hash for drift/tamper checks. Computed on write; not authored by hand.
